outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Iran claims its counter-proposal to end war is 'reasonable' after Trump's rejection
outlets.summary: CNN liveblog covers Trump's Truth Social rejection of Iran's counter-proposal as 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE.' Iran FM says US has 'unreasonable demands' while calling its own proposal 'reasonable and generous.' Analysts say deal could still be reached despite rhetorical escalation.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump calls Iran's response to ceasefire proposal 'unacceptable'
outlets.summary: WaPo reports on Trump's rejection of Iran's counter-proposal, which demanded Hormuz sovereignty recognition and war reparations. Analysis suggests Trump's rejection may be a pressure tactic ahead of Trump-Xi summit May 14-15, as deal remains 'just inches away' per Iranian FM.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump rejects Iran's latest response to U.S. ceasefire proposal
outlets.summary: NPR covers the collapse of latest peace talks round. Iran's counter-proposal via Pakistan included demands for Hormuz sovereignty and war reparations that Trump found unacceptable. Background on Pakistan's mediating role and what's keeping talks alive despite rejection.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Israel kills 51 in Lebanon including 2 medical workers as Hezbollah attacks hit record
outlets.summary: NPR reports on Lebanon's deadliest 24-hour period since ceasefire — 51 killed including 2 Health Authority workers. Hezbollah launched record 105 attack waves on Israel. IDF Chief Zamir declared 'there is no ceasefire in Lebanon.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: What Israel wants from Iran peace deal: no enrichment, missile limits, strict enforcement
outlets.summary: Fox frames Netanyahu's four red lines for any Iran deal as common sense security requirements. No enrichment of any kind, dismantlement of ballistic missile infrastructure, strict verification, and no linking to Lebanon ceasefire. Frames Iran's counter-proposal as a non-starter.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: Iran says it will 'never bow' as Trump rejects peace counteroffer, prolonging Middle East conflict
outlets.summary: CNBC covers Trump's rejection and Iranian defiance. Oil jumped ~2% on the news. Markets pricing in risk of prolonged conflict. Hormuz Day 70 remains effectively closed with ~15M bpd blocked. Gas $4.52 national average (+42% from pre-war).

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump slams Tehran's reply, Israel kills 2 medics in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog covers Day 73: Trump rejects Iran counter-proposal, Netanyahu's 60 Minutes interview insisting war 'not over,' Israel kills 51 in Lebanon including 2 medical workers, Hezbollah record 105 attacks, IDF reservist killed in drone strike.

outlets.name: The National (UAE)
outlets.headline: Iran war latest: Israeli air strikes kill 39 in Lebanon despite ceasefire; Gulf drone attacks
outlets.summary: The National covers escalating Lebanon violence and Gulf drone attacks. UAE and Kuwait both intercepted Iranian-linked drones on May 10. Qatar cargo ship hit. IDF strikes killing 39 across Lebanon — deadliest day since ceasefire. US Amb Waltz claims Mojtaba Khamenei 'severely injured and in hiding.'

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Don't Downplay the Risk: Iran and Trump Are One Step Away From All-out Regional War
outlets.summary: Haaretz warns the apparent ceasefire masks a very dangerous situation — Iran-US tensions remain a hair-trigger away from full-scale resumption of hostilities. Notes that Iran's hardliners actively want talks to fail, and Trump's impulsivity makes miscalculation likely.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Iran sends response to latest US peace proposal as Netanyahu insists war 'not over'
outlets.summary: ToI covers Iran's counter-proposal via Pakistan and Netanyahu's CBS 60 Minutes interview. Netanyahu said Iran's enriched uranium 'has to be taken out' and the war is 'not over.' Israel killed 20 top nuclear scientists. Demanded Iran dismantle all enrichment capability.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: IDF Hit Over 20 Hezbollah Targets in Lebanon; 51 Killed Including 2 Medics
outlets.summary: Haaretz liveblog covers escalating Lebanon violence: 51 killed in 24 hours including 2 Health Authority workers in Qalawiya and Tibnin. Hezbollah record 105 attack waves. IDF reservist Glovanyov killed in drone strike. Golani soldier killed by anti-tank missile in southern Lebanon.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Hezbollah fires record 105 attack waves at Israel in single day — 1 civilian killed, 14 injured in Nahariya
outlets.summary: JPost covers record Hezbollah attack tempo and Nahariya civilian death. Netanyahu emergency security cabinet convened. IDF Chief Zamir states 'there is no ceasefire in Lebanon.' Drone footage released by Hezbollah showing strike on Iron Dome battery.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian vows talks with US 'not surrender or retreat' from national interests
outlets.summary: Press TV frames Iran's counter-proposal as a principled defense of national sovereignty. Pezeshkian said Iran 'will never bow' to the enemy and any talks do not mean surrender. Iran's proposal is 'reasonable and generous' — the US bears responsibility for deal failure.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran submits response to latest US proposal for ending aggression
outlets.summary: Press TV frames Iran's 10-point response as reasonable and constructive. The US demand for 'nuclear moratorium first' is characterized as unreasonable — Iran's sequencing (end war, lift sanctions, then discuss nuclear) is portrayed as the logical path.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran condemns Trump's 'unacceptable' characterization of Tehran's peace proposal
outlets.summary: IRNA (Islamic Republic News Agency) covers Iranian government reaction to Trump's rejection. Foreign Ministry spokesperson says Iran's proposal is 'fair and based on international law.' Calls Trump's characterization a continuation of 'maximum pressure' policy that Iran will not accept.
